title: Helmeppo Shows His Cruelty
description: On pages 4–7, this part turns Zoro’s imprisonment into open action as Luffy forces the fight against Morgan’s Marines.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ALL RIGHT, SO I'M A PIRATE. I GAVE YOU MY WORD.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'VE FOUGHT THE NAVY, THEREFORE I'M OFFICIALLY AN OUTLAW...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: BUT, HEAR THIS!! I HAVE A MISSION TO FULFILL!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'm going to be the world's greatest swordsman!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: All I have left is my destiny!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: BUT YOU ARE MAKING ME BECOME A PIRATE! SO IF I HAVE TO ABANDON MY DREAM FOR ANY REASON...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...THEN I'M GOING TO MAKE YOU COMMIT HARA KIR!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The world's greatest swordsman, that's great!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it's fitting since your new boss is going to be the King of the Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Anything else would make me look bad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: HACK THOSE BRIGANDS INTO MINCE- MEAT! NOW!!

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
